app.tagline: Neighborhood platform for mutual aid and local life

home.title: A clean React base to build BobConnect
home.description: The frontend is ready for layout work, hero menu integration, future routes and the main product modules.
home.highlightsDescription: This base covers code organization, navigation, global styles, internationalization and day to day scripts.

architecture.title: Modular architecture
architecture.description: Feature based organization with a simple MVC split: controller, model and view inside each module.

routing.title: Clean routing
routing.description: React Router is configured for public pages, authenticated spaces and future administration routes.

tooling.title: Production tooling
tooling.description: Vite, TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest and pnpm are connected to dev, build, preview, lint, typecheck and test scripts.

home.roadmapDescription: The structure is ready for authentication, listings, signatures, events, messaging and voting.

errors.notFoundDescription: The requested route does not exist yet in the BobConnect frontend.
